x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces CUNY's federated reference data (campuses, degree programs, courses, aggregate enrollment, faculty/research) and adds submit_application — the net-new write workflow locked today inside CUNYfirst (Oracle PeopleSoft Campus Solutions).

server.name: io.nyc.cuny
server.title: City University of New York (CUNY)
server.description: Agent-native access to the City University of New York — the ~25 colleges and schools, their degree programs, course catalog, and aggregate enrollment/demographics, plus faculty and research, federated behind one contract, plus the net-new ability to submit and track a CUNY admissions application that today lives only in the CUNYfirst PeopleSoft self-service screens.
server.instructions: Use find_campuses / get_campus to locate CUNY colleges by borough or type (senior, community, graduate/professional, honors). find_programs / get_program search degree and certificate programs across all campuses; find_courses searches the course catalog (today locked in CUNYfirst). find_enrollment_statistics returns AGGREGATE demographics only — CUNY never exposes an individual student record (FERPA). find_faculty_research surfaces faculty and CUNY Academic Works output. submit_application (net-new) creates a CUNY admissions application; it requires an authenticated applicant and mutates state — confirm applicant type, admit term, and campus choices with the user before submitting. Note: CUNY publishes nothing under a CUNY agency label on NYC Open Data, so all reference data here is federated from cuny.edu and CUNYfirst, not Socrata.

tools.name: find_campuses
tools.title: Find Campuses
tools.description: Search CUNY colleges and schools by borough, type (senior/community/graduate/honors), and/or free text.

tools.name: get_campus
tools.title: Get Campus
tools.description: Fetch a CUNY college/school (type, address, enrollment, geography) by CUNYfirst institution code.

tools.name: find_programs
tools.title: Find Programs
tools.description: Search CUNY degree and certificate programs by campus, degree type, field, modality, or free text.

tools.name: get_program
tools.title: Get Program
tools.description: Fetch a CUNY degree or certificate program by program ID.

tools.name: find_courses
tools.title: Find Courses
tools.description: Search the CUNY course catalog by campus, subject, term, or modality — the catalog data today locked in the CUNYfirst PeopleSoft catalog browse.

tools.name: find_enrollment_statistics
tools.title: Find Enrollment Statistics
tools.description: Return AGGREGATE enrollment and demographics by campus and term (headcount, full/part-time, undergrad/grad, race/ethnicity, Pell). Never returns individual students.

tools.name: find_faculty_research
tools.title: Find Faculty & Research
tools.description: Search CUNY faculty and research output by campus, department, or research area — bridging faculty directories and the CUNY Academic Works repository.

tools.name: list_my_applications
tools.title: List My Applications
tools.description: List the authenticated applicant's own CUNY admissions applications and their status — today visible only inside the CUNYfirst self-service screens.

tools.name: submit_application
tools.title: Submit a CUNY Application
tools.description: Create and submit a CUNY admissions application (one application covering multiple campuses). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the CUNYfirst PeopleSoft self-service screens. Requires an authenticated applicant. Mutates state — confirm applicant type, admit term, and campus choices first.
